text: - (c) No alcoholic beverages, non-prescription drugs, or unsafe practices will be allowed on the job site. Subcontractor  shall  dismiss  anyone  participating  in  any  of  the  above  from  the  job  site  for  the  duration  of  the Project.  Only  prescription  drugs  that  include  a  doctor's  authorization  to  perform  construction  activities  after ingesting the prescription drug will be allowed on the job site. Violation of this provision is a material breach of this Subcontract. The use, possession, sale, transfer, purchase or state of being under the influence of alcohol, drugs or any  other  illegal  or  unlawful  substance  by  Subcontractor  or  Subcontractor's  employees,  or  Subcontractor's subcontractors or their employees at any time at the job or while on company business is prohibited.
